cases.passage: The city of Mumbai is facing a severe traffic congestion problem. The increasing number of vehicles on the road has led to a significant rise in travel time, air pollution, and accidents. To address this issue, the government has proposed the construction of a new metro line and the expansion of the existing bus network. The metro line will connect the city's main commercial centers, while the bus network will provide feeder services to the metro stations. The government has also planned to implement a smart traffic management system to optimize traffic signal timings and reduce congestion.

questions.q: What is the main problem faced by the city of Mumbai according to the passage?
questions.explanation: The passage states that the city is facing a severe traffic congestion problem.

questions.q: What is the proposed solution to address the traffic congestion problem in Mumbai?
opts: (B) Expansion of the existing bus network
(C) Construction of a new metro line and expansion of the bus network
(D) Implementation of a smart traffic management system
questions.explanation: The passage states that the government has proposed the construction of a new metro line and the expansion of the existing bus network.

questions.q: What is the purpose of the bus network in the proposed solution?
opts: (A) To provide an alternative mode of transport
(B) To provide feeder services to the metro stations
(C) To connect the city's main commercial centers
questions.explanation: The passage states that the bus network will provide feeder services to the metro stations.

questions.q: What is the expected outcome of the smart traffic management system?
opts: (C) Optimization of traffic signal timings and reduction in congestion
(D) Increase in the number of accidents
questions.explanation: The passage states that the smart traffic management system will optimize traffic signal timings and reduce congestion.

questions.q: What is the relationship between the metro line and the bus network in the proposed solution?
opts: (A) The metro line will replace the bus network
(B) The bus network will replace the metro line
(C) The metro line and the bus network will complement each other
(D) The metro line and the bus network will compete with each other
questions.explanation: The passage states that the metro line will connect the city's main commercial centers, while the bus network will provide feeder services to the metro stations, indicating that they will complement each other.

cases.passage: The Indian Railways has introduced a new high-speed train service between Delhi and Mumbai. The train will cover a distance of 1,400 km in just 12 hours, reducing the travel time by 6 hours compared to the existing train services. The train will have modern amenities such as air-conditioned coaches, comfortable seating, and onboard entertainment. The introduction of this high-speed train service is expected to boost economic growth, increase tourism, and reduce the burden on the road network. The train will also have a significant impact on the environment, as it will reduce carbon emissions and promote sustainable transportation.

questions.q: What is the main advantage of the new high-speed train service introduced by the Indian Railways?
questions.explanation: The passage states that the train will reduce travel time, provide modern amenities, and reduce carbon emissions.

questions.q: What is the expected impact of the high-speed train service on the environment?
questions.explanation: The passage states that the train will reduce carbon emissions and promote sustainable transportation.

questions.q: What is the relationship between the high-speed train service and economic growth?
opts: (A) The train service will have no impact on economic growth
(B) The train service will boost economic growth
(C) The train service will reduce economic growth
(D) The train service will have a negative impact on economic growth
questions.explanation: The passage states that the introduction of the high-speed train service is expected to boost economic growth.

questions.q: What is the distance covered by the high-speed train service between Delhi and Mumbai?
questions.explanation: The passage states that the train will cover a distance of 1,400 km.

questions.q: What is the expected impact of the high-speed train service on tourism?
questions.explanation: The passage states that the introduction of the high-speed train service is expected to increase tourism.
